Our Services

Precision Aerial Data Capture

RTK-enabled drone services delivering survey-grade accuracy for construction, solar, roofing, insurance, and beyond. We transform raw aerial data into actionable intelligence.

Our Capabilities

Photo & Video Capture

High-resolution aerial imagery and video from multiple perspectives and flight paths. Perfect for marketing, documentation, and detailed site assessment.

  • • 4K & 8K video capture
  • • 45-megapixel still imagery
  • • Thermal imaging available
Request Quote

Orthomosaics

Georeferenced composite aerial maps created from hundreds of overlapping images, providing accurate bird's-eye representations of your entire site.

  • • Sub-centimeter GSD
  • • GeoTIFF & web-ready formats
  • • Ready for measurement & planning
Request Quote

3D Point Clouds

Dense point cloud datasets from photogrammetry processing, suitable for detailed 3D modeling, volume calculations, and CAD/BIM integration.

  • • Survey-grade accuracy
  • • LAS/LAZ & E57 formats
  • • CAD/BIM workflow compatible
Request Quote

Topographic Maps

Elevation models and contour maps with precise terrain representation. Perfect for site planning, grading design, and hydrological analysis.

  • • ±2cm vertical accuracy (RTK)
  • • DSM & DTM options
  • • DXF/DWG exportable contours
Request Quote

Progress Monitoring

Track project development over time with scheduled, recurring aerial surveys. Compare construction milestones from initial site to completion.

  • • Scheduled recurring flights
  • • Before/during/after comparisons
  • • Timeline animations & reports
Request Quote

Stockpile Volumetrics

Precise volume calculations for aggregates, earthworks, construction materials, and stockpiles. Includes cut/fill analysis and rate-of-change monitoring.

  • • Cubic yard/meter calculations
  • • Cut/fill & movement analysis
  • • Invoicing-ready reports
Request Quote

Custom Analytics

Tailored data processing and analysis solutions built for your unique project requirements. From thermal inspections to site analytics and beyond.

  • • NDVI & vegetation indices
  • • Thermal & multispectral analysis
  • • Custom reporting & dashboards
Request Quote

Output Formats

GeoTIFF
LAS/LAZ
XYZ
OBJ/PLY
PDF Reports
3D PDFs
DXF/DWG
CSV

All deliverables are compatible with major CAD, GIS, and BIM platforms including AutoCAD, ArcGIS, Civil 3D, Revit, and QGIS.

How It Works

1

Scope

We discuss your project needs, site conditions, and required deliverables to plan the optimal flight strategy.

2

Fly

Our RTK-enabled drone captures high-resolution data from multiple angles and flight patterns to ensure complete coverage.

3

Process

Raw imagery is processed using advanced photogrammetry software into your chosen deliverables with quality assurance checks.

4

Deliver

Finished data products are delivered in your preferred format via secure cloud storage for immediate use in your workflows.

Need a Custom Solution?

Every project is unique. We develop tailored packages and workflows based on your specific industry requirements, timeline, and budget to deliver exactly what you need.

Get Started Today
